title: Light Protocol Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report provides detailed vulnerability analysis with clear descriptions, proof of concepts, and actionable recommendations. The identified vulnerabilities (reentrancy and unchecked external calls) are common and important to address for security.
audit.improvements: The report could include a section on the potential impact of each vulnerability on the system's security and performance. Additionally, it might benefit from a more comprehensive review of the contract's functionality to ensure no other critical issues are present.
